description.admin: This real-time gauge tracks the overall activity of the platform. It calculates the ratio of active logs versus total users. A high score means your community is actively tracking and engaged.
description.staff: Monitors the efficiency of the platform's clinical response times.
description.regular: Ensures the system is operating optimally for quick data processing.

description.admin: This metric measures how well your staff is interacting with their assigned clients. It analyzes message response times and diary feedback frequency to give a performance score.
description.staff: Highlights your client engagement rating based on response times.
description.regular: Tracks the overall platform professional response metrics.

description.admin: A dedicated stream of every action happening on NutriDeq. This ensures you always have a pulse on broad platform usage.
description.staff: Track recently logged diaries or interactions across assigned patients globally.
description.regular: A timeline of your recent interactions with staff.

description.admin: A system health monitor checking database adherence for calorie and macro tracking.
description.staff: Reflects the client's macro-adherence to the clinical targets you set, pulling direct from their food diaries.
description.regular: Your daily health goals represented as progress rings. Complete the rings by logging your food!

description.admin: Tracks deployment of Dietitian-created meal plans across the platform.
description.staff: Quick-deploy custom nutritional guidelines and diets to assigned clients.
description.regular: Your dietitian-assigned meal plans and dietary targets to guide your daily eating.

description.admin: Monitors overall telemetry of water input across all users.
description.staff: Verify if the client is meeting basic hydration benchmarks.
description.regular: Tap the + button every time you drink a glass of water to build a healthy habit. Hydration is critical for metabolism!

description.admin: Monitors messaging channels to ensure smooth server transport.
description.staff: A quick interface to review and reply to flagged patient concerns.
description.regular: Direct access to your assigned Registered Dietitian to ask clinical or dietary questions!

description.admin: Tracks BMI demographic changes on a platform-wide scale.
description.staff: A longitudinal chart assessing a client's weight trend and biological changes.
description.regular: Watch your progress! Update your weight to visualize your health journey over time.
